column1: The pan was___________hot that I nearly dropped it!
Mr Jones was__________a kind man that I was sad when he moved to another town.
We have___________many pets that sometimes it's really noisy!
Alicia is___________good at basketball that I think she could be a professional.
There was_____________a lot of smoke that I couldn't see.
Tyrone ran____________fast that no one had a chance in the race.
Cherie is_________________popular that everyone wants to be friends with her.
Would you like to have___________long hair that you can sit on it?
